The creatures and beings of the Willverse, by kind.

; By kind
* [[:Category:Sacred beasts|Sacred beasts]]
* [[:Category:Remnants|Remnants]]
* [[:Category:Dreadgods|Dreadgods]]
* [[:Category:Dreadbeasts|Dreadbeasts]]
* [[:Category:Kameira|Kameira]]
* [[:Category:Elders and Elderspawn|Elders and Elderspawn]]
* [[:Category:Aliens|Aliens]]

[[Category:Content]]
